input: To flag an article, click the Flag Article button in the article header. ServiceNow creates a knowledge feedback task record, which the CTSS Knowledge team reviews. See KB0022991 for the full management SOP.
notes: Only allowlisted KB number mentioned; no invented names or off-allowlist URLs

input: The publishing approvers include Richard Danilowicz, Samantha Eaton, and Nicholas Hile. Refer to KB0022991 at https://mmcnow.service-now.com/kb_view.do?sysparm_article=KB0022991 for the full list.
notes: All 3 approver names are allowlisted; KB ID and URL are in allowlist from source

input: The article naming convention is documented in KB0020882. Use the format: [Application/Topic] - [Type Descriptor] - [OPCO or Line of Business] - [Region].
notes: KB0020882 is allowlisted; no names or off-allowlist URLs

input: Submit to KB9999999 for approval by John Fabricated.
notes: KB9999999 is NOT in allowlist (fabricated KB ID); violationClass=names fires first because NAME_RE matches John Fabricated before KB_ID_RE

input: See KB8888888 for details on the process.
notes: KB8888888 is NOT in the allowlist — fabricated KB ID, no approver names
